name: StraightDimensionSet.StraightDimensionSetAttributes
summary: The StraightDimensionSetAttributes class contains the attributes for managing all the attributes of the straight dimension.

constructors.name: StraightDimensionSet.StraightDimensionSetAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a default straight dimension set attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: StraightDimensionSet.StraightDimensionSetAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a straight dimension set attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

constructors.name: StraightDimensionSet.StraightDimensionSetAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a default straight dimension set attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: StraightDimensionSet.StraightDimensionSetAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a straight dimension set attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

properties.name: Arrowhead
properties.summary: The arrowhead attributes of the dimension.

properties.name: Color
properties.summary: The color of the dimension line.

properties.name: CombinedDimension
properties.summary: Combines the attributes of the dimension.

properties.name: DimensionType
properties.summary: The dimension type.

properties.name: Exaggeration
properties.summary: The exaggeration attributes of the dimension.

properties.name: ExcludePartsAccordingToFilter
properties.summary: Sets the filter to use for excluding parts from the tags. You may query the possible filters using StraightDimensionSet.GetAllExcludePartsAccordingToFilter()

properties.name: ExtensionLine
properties.summary: The extension line presentation of the dimension.

properties.name: Format
properties.summary: The format attributes of the dimension.

properties.name: IncludePartCountInTag
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the part count is included in at least one of the tag position, or set part count flag for all tag positions.

properties.name: IncludePartCountInTagA
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the part count is included in the tag A.

properties.name: IncludePartCountInTagB
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the part count is included in the tag B.

properties.name: IncludePartCountInTagC
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the part count is included in the tag C.

properties.name: IncludePartCountInTagD
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the part count is included in the tag D.

properties.name: IncludePartCountInTagE
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the part count is included in the tag E.

properties.name: IncludePartCountInTagF
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the part count is included in the tag F.

properties.name: IncludePartCountInTagG
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the part count is included in the tag G.

properties.name: LeftLowerTag
properties.summary: The left lower dimension tag.

properties.name: LeftMiddleTag
properties.summary: The left middle dimension tag.

properties.name: LeftUpperTag
properties.summary: The left upper dimension tag.

properties.name: Placing
properties.summary: The placing attributes of the dimension.

properties.name: RightLowerTag
properties.summary: The right lower dimension tag.

properties.name: RightMiddleTag
properties.summary: The right middle dimension tag.

properties.name: RightUpperTag
properties.summary: The right upper dimension tag.

properties.name: ShortDimension
properties.summary: How short dimensions are shown.

properties.name: Text
properties.summary: The text attributes of the dimension.

properties.name: TransparentBackground
properties.summary: The dimension text background transparency. (transparent/opaque)

properties.name: TrueColor
properties.summary: The true color (RGB enabled) of the dimension line.
